pr.title: 30-Layer Recursive GPT (10 Physical x 3 Recursive) + VRL + Parallel Muon

output.summary: Three-level recursive stacking of a 10-layer GPT complements VRL/MTP, Parameter Banking+Parallel Muon, and LeakyReLU² while running legal score-first TTT on validation chunks.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Legal score-first TTT runs SGD adaptation on validation chunks right after stateless scoring, so training occurs on val data.
techniques: LeakyReLU(0.5)² plus Parameter Banking/Parallel Muon optimizer
